'''Ukert''' was an [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] of clan [[Ubskai]] who ran a small criminal empire on the planet [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]]. He was known as a rival of [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] crime lord, [[Maxeena Sov'lya]]. Ukert also owned the legitimate [[Reclamation Services, Inc.]] recycling operation on Kothlis. Ukert secretly served as a go-between for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], storing weapons from the [[Botha Ammunitions Corporation]] in recycling bins.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Garbage Run|book=Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide}} {{1st}}
